column7: Promotes vigorous vegetative growth; top-dress at active tillering (21 DAT) and PI for max yield.
Ensures all macro-nutrients available from day 1; supports high early growth rate in hybrid.
Sulfur component boosts amino acid synthesis; improves grain protein profile and milling quality.
Enhances panicle weight and filled grain percentage; improves grain plumpness at maturity.
Triacontanol stimulates photosynthetic rate; iron and zinc micronutrients support chlorophyll synthesis and leaf greenness in high-yield hybrid.
Humic and fulvic acids improve nutrient chelation; sea kelp extract promotes cell division and panicle initiation in hybrid.
Organic acids in mix lower localized soil pH around roots; improves micronutrient availability in alkaline paddy soils.
Azolla decomposition improves soil organic matter; released N supports high-yield hybrid's tillering stage without leaching risk.
Foliar NPK at heading stage improves grain set percentage; rapid leaf absorption bypasses soil nutrient fixation issues.
